chapters_subtitle: Mishneh Torah by Rambam · 19 Chapters · 235 Halachot
footer_source: Source: Mishneh Torah by Rambam, Hilchot Kiddush HaChodesh · Steinsaltz Commentary (Koren) · Touger Translation (Moznaim)
footer_verse: "Seek from the book of God and read — not one of these shall be missing" (19:16)
error_server_hint: Try running a local server: python3 -m http.server
layer1_desc: Lunar months, solar years, intercalation, the court
layer3_desc: 360 degrees, mean and true, orbits, corrections
layer4_desc: Latitude, arc of sighting, visibility thresholds, crescent direction
